text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while heading to my office...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: O-ouuuch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hear a cry of pain coming from the infirmary. It's El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I should go take a look!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, no-no-no, not like this! I have to recover and get back to
training!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
With my mask on, I'm invincible! The strongest, undefeated, bravest,
and most perfect Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It'll be okay. I'm strong. I'm tough! So it's all good.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to—ow-ow-ow!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaaaa?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
T-T-T-T-T-T-Trainer?! Close! Your eyes! Right now! Right this instant!
Now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She shouts at me so loudly that I instinctively close my eyes.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: There... we go!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Okay. You can open them now, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Whew... You didn't see anything, right? After all, there was nothing to
see! Right?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You. Saw. Nothing. Right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Talk about scary...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Good, I'm glad to hear it! By the way, what brings you here, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, could it be that you heard my voice earlier? And now you're here
to check on me?
choice_data_list: Are your legs all right? Let me see.
Are your legs all right? Let me see.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ah—no, really, they're fine! All bueno! Gracias for the concern, but
I'm right as rain!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, you came flying in here just because you heard my
cries of pain?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Such passion! You're overflowing with fiery passion! I might even melt!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Seeing you get all fired up like this makes me feel better already!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Looks like the world's strongest racer really does need a trusty partner
in crime!
choice_data_list:
So you're really aiming to be the world's
strongest?

So you're really aiming to be the world's
strongest?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Tch, tch, tch. Trainer, I'm not aiming... I'm proving that I'm the world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's my promise to Papa's mask. He handed it down to me, you
know.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
He told me, "This is your papa's mask—the mask of the world's
strongest masked wrestler! Once you put it on, you'll be the world's
strongest too, El!"

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: When I put the mask on, the weak and cowardly crybaby El vanished.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
In her place, El Condor Pasa—the world's bravest, speediest, and
strongest racer—was booorn!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I swore by this mask that one day, I would make a name for myself as
the world's strongest racer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: O-ouch!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: D-don't worry, it's nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Contrary to her words, she looks like she's in pain. Those consecutive
training programs must have done a number on her body...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! Today... might not be the best day, but I wanna try
your training program next!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Heheh, I know what you're thinking. After all, you are the one who came to scout me straight away.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I bet you're starting to get reeeal impatient waiting for your turn to
train me, right?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'll grant you that wish of yours! Next time, let's meet on the track!
Chao!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: O-o-ouuuch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I still can't match her in energy, but for now, it looks like I'm next up
in El Condor Pasa's training queue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, what kind of training program does someone aiming to be the
strongest in the world need? I'll need to take my time and give this
some thought...
